codeReview.summary: Reviewed the handoff/progress context, transcript skeleton, and commit diff. The feature matches its goals: older-history prepends now dedupe by event ID across repeated and overlapping pages while retaining the fresher thread detail metadata during pagination, and thread-list reload/reconnect catch-up merge fetched summaries with current state so newer detail-synced rows are not overwritten by stale list payloads. The added real-thread-backed widget coverage directly exercises both VAL-FLUTTER-006 and VAL-CROSS-003 behaviors, and the reviewed diff does not leave a remaining blocking or non-blocking issue for this feature.

summary: Reviewed the feature handoff/progress context, transcript skeleton, existing scrutiny review schema, and commit `82d231e9b65f9b59deb8bec6c2787fa842b53843`, then re-ran the two new focused Flutter widget tests for pagination dedupe and stale list/detail sync. The change set is coherent with VAL-FLUTTER-006 and VAL-CROSS-003: older-history pagination now keeps event IDs unique while exhausting cleanly, pagination no longer regresses thread metadata to older page payloads, and stale thread-list reloads preserve newer detail-synced row data. No blocking or non-blocking code issues identified, so this scrutiny review passes.
